2192410.name: Tales of Sabotage
2192410.description:
Enter a land of adventure and fantasy in which you must piece together a forgotten past and choose your future.

PLAY YOUR WAY


  • Defeat your foes with sword and shield, wield destructive spells or pick your enemies off at a distance with a bow and arrow. The choice is yours.
  • With a myriad of weapons, armour, skills and perks to choose from, you can craft your character to match your playstyle.

FIGHT THE DECAY


  • Prove your worth to the citizens of Thidruen as you help uncover the cause of The Decay which has taken hold in the land.
  • Fight the corruption and death which is spilling across the once peaceful meadows.

FIND ANCIENT TREASURE


  • Delve into dim dungeons and explore large landscapes from lush forests to snowy mountains in search of treasure.
  • Beware the enemies standing guard as you seek to take what is theirs.

GATHER & CRAFT


  • Take a break from battle and try your hand at mining, smelting, woodcutting, fishing and crafting.
  • Utilize your loot to improve your equipment and become stronger to fight more deadly foes.

The people of Thidruen need your help now more than ever before!
2192410.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
